content.scenarioHint: 你在学术研讨会后向演讲者提问，想了解他们为何选择特定的研究方法，语气礼貌且专业。

options.text: Why did you pick that method? It seems weird.
I’m curious—could you share the reasoning behind your choice of research methodology?
Your method must be wrong because others use different ones.
Can you just tell me the name of the method you used?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了礼貌、开放的学术提问方式，符合‘开场问候+引出问题’的场景要求。干扰项1语气冒犯，干扰项3具攻击性且不专业，干扰项4过于简单，缺乏对话的深度和礼貌性，无法有效引出后续详细回应。

options.text: Of course! I used structured interviews and validated surveys to ensure reliability.
I guess you didn’t like it?
I’m not sure what you mean.

content.explanation: 正确答案以积极态度回应赞美，并提供具体信息，符合开场问候后自然延伸话题的语用规则。其他选项或误解语境，或回避问题，缺乏礼貌与专业性。
content.speakerText: I really enjoyed your presentation. Could you tell me more about your data collection process?
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常欣赏你的演讲，能告诉我更多关于你的数据收集过程吗？
